reviewed_items.reviewer_notes: All 3 gates passed. Spec deviation confirmed: signature verification is bypassed for resubmitted blocks when chain head moves to different slot/proposer (L498-501 early return). However, impact is minimal - invalid blocks are silently ignored (ValidationIgnore at L124), not accepted or propagated. No state transition, consensus impact, or slashing occurs. Downgraded from HIGH to Low due to limited exploitability - attacker can only cause silent drop of already-seen invalid blocks without network impact. Does not meet Medium threshold (>5% network impact).
